mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITEM
STATUS = 'N'
STATUS IN ('E', 'C', 'F', 'O')
STATUS = 'Y'
ITEM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND STATUS != 'D'
AND ITEM_CD_NO = #{category}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT i.*, (SELECT img_url FROM ITEM_IMG WHERE ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO AND ROWNUM = 1) AS MAIN_IMG, (SELECT USER_NAME FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_NO = i.USER_NO) AS USER_NAME, (SELECT ITEM_CATEGORY FROM ITEM_CD WHERE ITEM_CATEGORY_NO = i.ITEM_CD_NO) AS CATEGORY_NAME FROM ITEM i
STATUS = 'N'
STATUS IN ('E', 'C', 'F', 'O')
STATUS = 'Y'
ITEM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND STATUS != 'D'
AND ITEM_CD_NO = #{category}
ORDER BY START_TIME ASC
ORDER BY START_TIME DESC
ORDER BY END_TIME ASC
ORDER BY END_TIME DESC
ORDER BY VIEWS DESC
ORDER BY ITEM_NO DESC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ITEM_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ITEM ( ITEM_NO, ITEM_TITLE, ITEM_CONTENT, ITEM_SIZE, START_PRICE, DIRECT_BUY, BUY_NOW_PRICE, CURRENT_PRICE, END_TIME, ITEM_CD_NO, USER_NO, COUNTRY_NO, STATUS, START_TIME, CREATE_AT ) VALUES ( #{itemNo}, #{itemTitle}, #{itemContent}, #{itemSize}, #{startPrice}, #{directBuy}, #{buyNowPrice}, #{startPrice}, #{endTime}, #{itemCdNo}, #{userNo}, #{countryNo}, CASE WHEN #{startTime} > SYSDATE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, #{startTime}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT I.*, M.USER_NAME FROM ITEM I JOIN MEMBER M ON (I.USER_NO = M.USER_NO) WHERE I.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} AND I.STATUS != 'D'
SELECT * FROM ITEM_IMG WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ORDER BY ITEM_IMG_NO ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT i.*, (SELECT img_url FROM ITEM_IMG WHERE ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO AND ROWNUM = 1) AS MAIN_IMG, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BID WHERE ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO) AS BID_COUNT,
NVL( (SELECT BID_PRICE FROM ( SELECT ITEM_NO, BID_PRICE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY ITEM_NO ORDER BY BID_PRICE DESC) as rn FROM BID ) b_rank WHERE b_rank.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO AND rn = 2), i.START_PRICE ) AS BID_PRICE
FROM ITEM i WHERE STATUS = 'N' ORDER BY BID_COUNT DESC, ITEM_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4
mapper.update: UPDATE ITEM SET STATUS = CASE WHEN SYSDATE >= END_TIME THEN 'E' WHEN SYSDATE >= START_TIME THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END WHERE STATUS NOT IN ('E', 'D', 'C', 'F', 'O') AND STATUS != CASE WHEN SYSDATE >= END_TIME THEN 'E' WHEN SYSDATE >= START_TIME THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ITEM WHERE STATUS = 'N' AND WINNER_PROCESSED = 'N'
SELECT I.*, M.USER_NAME FROM ITEM I JOIN MEMBER M ON (I.USER_NO = M.USER_NO) WHERE I.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} AND I.STATUS != 'D'
mapper.update: UPDATE ITEM SET STATUS = 'E', END_TIME = SYSDATE, CURRENT_PRICE = #{price}, WINNER_PROCESSED = 'Y' WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo}
UPDATE ITEM SET PAYMENT_DEADLINE = SYSDATE + 7 WHERE STATUS = 'E' AND PAYMENT_DEADLINE IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_NO FROM ITEM WHERE STATUS = 'E' AND PAY_STATUS = 'N' AND PAYMENT_DEADLINE < SYSDATE
